title: The Elite Trial
description: You've proven yourself capable, but Guildmaster Vorn now offers something few achieve: a chance to become an Elite member. The trial is simple in concept, brutal in execution. First, you must clear the deepest chamber of Willow Dale ruins alone - no backup, no rescue. Then, you'll face Katrina Steelwind, the Guild's champion, in single combat. Only those who pass both tests earn the black seal of an Elite adventurer - and access to the Guild's most dangerous contracts.

objectives.description: Accept the Elite Trial from Guildmaster Vorn
Travel to Willow Dale ruins alone
Survive the depths of Willow Dale and defeat the guardian
Collect the Trial Token from the guardian's corpse
Return to the Guild Hall in Dalhurst
Defeat Katrina Steelwind in honorable combat
Receive your Elite rank from Guildmaster Vorn

notes: Major trial quest for guild advancement. Two-part challenge: solo dungeon clear in Willow Dale depths (hard difficulty enemies + boss), then duel with NPC champion back at guild hall. Katrina is non-lethal - she yields at 25% HP and player yields if reduced to 25% (quest fails, can retry). Unlocks elite contract tier and special vendor access. Elite seal grants 10% discount at all Guild-affiliated merchants.
